<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 6: wait for specific response'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Set up the intercept with a small delay to simulate network latency.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">route</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/applicant*'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> (</span><span style="color:#FFAB70">route</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">    await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> route.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">fulfill</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">({</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      status: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      contentType: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'application/json'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">JSON</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">stringify</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">({</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        name: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Elena Vasquez'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        email: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'elena@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        country: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Spain'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        riskLevel: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Low'</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      })</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // page.waitForResponse(urlOrPredicate) returns a Promise that resolves</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // when a response matching the pattern is received. We start waiting</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // BEFORE clicking the button, then await both promises.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  const</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> responsePromise</span><span style="color:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">waitForResponse</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/applicant*'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Click the button to trigger the request.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'load-applicant-btn'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Await the response. This pauses the test until the response arrives.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  const</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> response</span><span style="color:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#F97583"> await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> responsePromise;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Verify the response details.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // response.status() returns the HTTP status code.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(response.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">status</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">()).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBe</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // response.json() parses the response body as JSON.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  const</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> data</span><span style="color:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#F97583"> await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> response.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">json</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(data.name).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBe</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Elena Vasquez'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Verify the UI also updated.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'applicant-name'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Elena Vasquez'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 7: Verify Multiple Requests</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// This exercise sets up intercepts for both GET and POST requests, triggers</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// both, and verifies that both were made.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 7: verify multiple requests'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Track how many times each route was called.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  let</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> getRequestCount </span><span style="color:#F97583">=</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> 0</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  let</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> postRequestCount </span><span style="color:#F97583">=</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> 0</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Intercept the GET request.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">route</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/applicant*'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> (</span><span style="color:#FFAB70">route</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    getRequestCount</span><span style="color:#F97583">++</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">    await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> route.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">fulfill</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">({</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      status: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      contentType: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'application/json'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">JSON</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">stringify</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">({</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        name: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Fiona Chen'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        email: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'fiona@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        country: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'China'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        riskLevel: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Medium'</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      })</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Intercept the POST request.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">route</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/kyc/submit'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> (</span><span style="color:#FFAB70">route</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    postRequestCount</span><span style="color:#F97583">++</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">    await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> route.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">fulfill</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">({</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      status: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      contentType: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'application/json'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">JSON</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">stringify</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">({ referenceId: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'KYC-2024-007'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> })</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Trigger the GET request by loading applicant data.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'load-applicant-btn'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'applicant-card'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Trigger the POST request by submitting the form.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'full-name-input'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">fill</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Fiona Chen'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'email-input'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">fill</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'fiona@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submit-btn'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submit-status'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Verify both requests were made exactly once.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(getRequestCount).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBe</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">1</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(postRequestCount).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBe</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">1</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 8: Abort a Request</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// This exercise demonstrates route.abort(), which cancels a request entirely.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// The app's fetch() call will throw a network error.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 8: abort a request'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // route.abort(errorCode?) cancels the request. The browser treats this as</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // a network failure. The app's try/catch block handles it and shows an error.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Common error codes:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  //   'aborted'            — the request was aborted by the client</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  //   'failed'             — generic network failure</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  //   'connectionrefused'  — server refused the connection</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">route</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/kyc/submit'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> (</span><span style="color:#FFAB70">route</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">    await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> route.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">abort</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'failed'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Fill in the form and submit.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'full-name-input'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">fill</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Grace Kim'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'email-input'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">fill</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'grace@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submit-btn'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Verify the error message appears — the app shows an error when fetch fails.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submit-status'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submit-status'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveClass</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">/</span><span style="color:#DBEDFF">status-error</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">/</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span></code></pre>ef:Tbfd0,<pre class="shiki github-dark" style="background-color:#24292e;color:#e1e4e8" tabindex="0"><code><span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">const</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF"> '/phase-04-api-and-realtime/22-network-interception/playground/'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">describe</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Kata 22: Network Interception'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // beforeEach runs before every test in this describe block.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // We navigate to the playground page so each test starts fresh.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  beforeEach</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(() </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">visit</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 1: Intercept POST and Return Mock Success</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // This exercise demonstrates cy.intercept() to intercept a POST request</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // and return a mock response. The app's fetch() receives this fake response.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 1: intercept POST and return mock success'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // cy.intercept(method, url, response) sets up a request interception.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    //   method   — the HTTP method to match ('POST', 'GET', etc.)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    //   url      — a URL pattern (string glob or RegExp) to match</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    //   response — an object with { statusCode, body, headers } to return</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    //</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // .as('alias') gives this intercept a name so cy.wait() can reference it.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">intercept</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'POST'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/kyc/submit'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      statusCode: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: { referenceId: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'KYC-2024-001'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    }).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">as</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Fill in the form fields.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // type(text) types into an input field.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="full-name-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Aisha Patel'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="email-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'aisha@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Click submit to trigger the POST request.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-btn"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // cy.wait('@alias') pauses the test until the intercepted request completes.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // This ensures the response has been received before we assert on the UI.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">wait</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'@submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Verify the success message shows the reference ID from our mock.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-status"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'contain.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'KYC-2024-001'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">and</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.class'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'status-success'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 2: Intercept GET and Return Mock Applicant Data</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // This exercise intercepts a GET request with a URL glob pattern and</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // returns mock applicant data.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 2: intercept GET and return mock applicant data'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // The '*' in the URL pattern matches any characters, including the</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // query string (?id=APP-1001) that the app appends.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">intercept</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'GET'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/applicant*'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      statusCode: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        name: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Aisha Patel'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        email: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'aisha@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        country: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'India'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        riskLevel: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'High'</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    }).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">as</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'getApplicant'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Click the button to trigger the GET request.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="load-applicant-btn"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Wait for the intercepted request to complete.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">wait</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'@getApplicant'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Verify the applicant card is visible and shows the mock data.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="applicant-card"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="applicant-name"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Aisha Patel'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="applicant-email"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'aisha@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="applicant-country"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'India'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="applicant-risk"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'High'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 3: Verify Request Body Sent</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // This exercise inspects the request body after the intercept fires to</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // verify the app sends the correct form data.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 3: verify request body sent in POST'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Set up the intercept. We return a success response so the app</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // completes normally.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">intercept</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'POST'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/kyc/submit'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      statusCode: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: { referenceId: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'KYC-2024-002'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    }).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">as</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Fill in the form with specific values.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="full-name-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Ben Okafor'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="email-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'ben@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // select(value) selects an &#x3C;option> by its value attribute in a &#x3C;select>.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="country-select"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">select</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'GB'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="doc-type-select"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">select</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'drivers-license'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Submit the form.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-btn"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // cy.wait('@alias') yields the interception object. We use .then() to</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // access it and inspect the request body.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">wait</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'@submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">then</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">((</span><span style="color:#FFAB70">interception</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">      // interception.request.body contains the parsed request body.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">      // For JSON requests, Cypress automatically parses it into an object.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">      const</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> body</span><span style="color:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> interception.request.body;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">      expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(body).to.have.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">property</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'fullName'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Ben Okafor'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">      expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(body).to.have.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">property</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'email'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'ben@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">      expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(body).to.have.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">property</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'country'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'GB'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">      expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(body).to.have.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">property</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'documentType'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'drivers-license'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 4: Verify Request Headers</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // This exercise inspects the request headers to verify the app sends the</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // correct Content-Type, Authorization, and custom headers.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 4: verify request headers'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">intercept</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'POST'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/kyc/submit'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      statusCode: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: { referenceId: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'KYC-2024-003'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    }).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">as</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Fill in required fields and submit.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="full-name-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Clara Jansen'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="email-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'clara@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-btn"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Inspect the headers from the interception object.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">wait</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'@submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">then</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">((</span><span style="color:#FFAB70">interception</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">      // interception.request.headers is an object of header name -> value.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">      // Header names are lowercased.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">      const</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> headers</span><span style="color:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> interception.request.headers;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">      expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(headers).to.have.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">property</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'content-type'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'application/json'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">      expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(headers).to.have.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">property</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'authorization'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Bearer test-token-abc123'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">      expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(headers).to.have.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">property</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'x-client-version'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'1.0.0'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 5: Intercept and Return Error Response</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // This exercise returns an error response (422) so we can test the app's</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // error handling UI.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 5: intercept and return error response'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Return a 422 status with an error message in the body.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">intercept</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'POST'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/kyc/submit'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      statusCode: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">422</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: { message: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Invalid document type for selected country'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    }).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">as</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Fill in and submit the form.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="full-name-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Derek Wong'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="email-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'derek@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-btn"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Wait for the response and verify the error is shown.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">wait</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'@submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-status"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'contain.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Invalid document type for selected country'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">and</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.class'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'status-error'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 6: Wait for Specific Response</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // This exercise demonstrates the cy.wait('@alias') pattern to explicitly</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // wait for a specific intercepted request to complete before asserting.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 6: wait for specific response'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Use a route handler function (instead of a static response) to add</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // a simulated delay. The req.reply() method sends the mock response.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">intercept</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'GET'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/applicant*'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, (</span><span style="color:#FFAB70">req</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">      // req.reply(responseObject) sends a mock response.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">      // delay adds a simulated network delay in milliseconds.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      req.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">reply</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">({</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        statusCode: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        body: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">          name: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Elena Vasquez'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">          email: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'elena@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">          country: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Spain'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">          riskLevel: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Low'</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        delay: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    }).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">as</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'getApplicant'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Click the button to trigger the request.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="load-applicant-btn"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // cy.wait('@getApplicant') pauses until the response arrives.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // It yields the interception object which we can inspect.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">wait</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'@getApplicant'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">then</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">((</span><span style="color:#FFAB70">interception</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">      // Verify the response status and body.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">      expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(interception.response</span><span style="color:#F97583">!</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">.statusCode).to.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">equal</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">      expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(interception.response</span><span style="color:#F97583">!</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">.body).to.have.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">property</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'name'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Elena Vasquez'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Verify the UI shows the data after the response arrived.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="applicant-name"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Elena Vasquez'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 7: Verify Multiple Requests</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // This exercise sets up intercepts for both GET and POST, triggers both</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // requests, and verifies both completed.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 7: verify multiple requests'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Set up intercepts for both endpoints with aliases.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">intercept</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'GET'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/applicant*'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      statusCode: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        name: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Fiona Chen'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        email: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'fiona@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        country: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'China'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">        riskLevel: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Medium'</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    }).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">as</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'getApplicant'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">intercept</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'POST'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/kyc/submit'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      statusCode: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">200</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      body: { referenceId: </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'KYC-2024-007'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    }).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">as</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Trigger the GET request.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="load-applicant-btn"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Wait for the GET request to complete.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">wait</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'@getApplicant'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="applicant-card"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Now trigger the POST request.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="full-name-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Fiona Chen'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="email-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'fiona@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-btn"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Wait for the POST request to complete.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">wait</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'@submitKyc'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Verify both UI sections updated.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="applicant-name"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Fiona Chen'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-status"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'contain.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'KYC-2024-007'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 8: Abort a Request</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // This exercise simulates a network failure using forceNetworkError.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // The app's fetch() call will throw an error and the error UI should appear.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 8: abort a request'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // { forceNetworkError: true } simulates a complete network failure.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // The fetch() call in the app throws a TypeError (network error).</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // This is Cypress's equivalent of Playwright's route.abort().</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">intercept</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'POST'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'/api/kyc/submit'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      forceNetworkError: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">true</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    }).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">as</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'submitFail'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Fill in the form and submit.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="full-name-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Grace Kim'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="email-input"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'grace@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-btn"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Verify the error message appears in the UI.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Note: We don't cy.wait('@submitFail') because the network error</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // means there is no response to wait for. Instead, we assert on the</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // visible error state in the UI.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="submit-status"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">and</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.class'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'status-error'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
